messages.content:
帮我翻译下面的内容为英文：
Dear A Yeon Kim,  
很抱歉，我刚刚结束中国农历新年的休假，因此回复很晚，希望这没有耽误您的研究。也很感谢您对我的研究的关注与兴趣。Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct模型从ToxicSpan, IHC, HatExplain三个数据集提取出来合并后的MetaTox Graph已经随附件一同发送给您，请您查收。同时我也希望提醒您，Qwen2.5-14B也只是一个相对比较老的模型，相对于新的模型，比如Qwen3.5等，能力有很大差距，并且知识覆盖面也并不够。我个人更建议您使用我GitHub上提供的代码基于更新、更强的模型重新进行抽取。祝研究顺利

Dear A Yeon Kim,  

I’m very sorry for my late reply, as I have just returned from the Chinese Lunar New Year holiday. I hope this has not delayed your research. Thank you as well for your attention to and interest in my work.  

The MetaTox Graph extracted from the ToxicSpan, IHC, and HatExplain datasets using the Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct model, and then merged, has been sent to you as an attachment. Please check it.  

Meanwhile, I would like to remind you that Qwen2.5-14B is a relatively older model. Compared with newer models such as Qwen3.5, it lags far behind in capability, and its knowledge coverage is also limited. Personally, I would recommend using the code provided on my GitHub to re-run the extraction with a newer and more powerful model.  

Best wishes for your research.
